strategy: Hit with Ice (+35%); he resists Fire 35%.
Every blade you cast makes him Hex you (+35% incoming damage), and every trap or shield does the same — so minimize charms and wards.
Use Aura spells for your damage boost instead — auras don't trigger the Hex, and pet-cast blades are safe too.
He's low health (3,435); a single buffed Ice hit ends it.
If you must blade, accept one Hex and hit the same round before it matters.
cheatNotes: Cast a blade and he interrupt-Hexes you (+35% incoming damage) — lean on auras instead, which don't trigger it.
Global spells also trigger the Hex; auras do not.
Cast a trap (Feint included) or a shield and he Hexes you the same way — keep setup minimal.
